name: jpm-payments-skills
description: J.P. Morgan Payments developer-experience marketplace. Distributes the jpm-payments-skills plugin (merchant onboarding/OAuth/Checkout/Online Payments, plus Embedded Payments EF&S API integrations) for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot.

plugins.name: jpm-payments-skills
plugins.description: Conversational agent skills for J.P. Morgan Payments merchants (onboarding, OAuth, Checkout, Online Payments) and Embedded Payments / EF&S API integrations (onboarding, accounts, recipients, transactions, webhooks).
